description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a slightly curved, flat lid that covers the entire top surface. The exterior is heavily weathered, featuring rust stains, dirt, and a variety of colorful graffiti tags and markings, especially prominent on the longer sides. The lid appears to be made of a lighter-colored metal or plastic, contrasting with the darker, stained body. There are no visible handles, wheels, or locking mechanisms on any side, and the base sits directly on the ground. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for outdoor use in urban environments, where it can withstand exposure to the elements and frequent public interaction.
description: A large, weathered metal dumpster with a curved flat lid and graffiti-covered sides, designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main access side with extensive graffiti and rust, and the full width of the curved lid.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a plain, rust-stained panel with minimal graffiti and no visible handles or wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a long, heavily stained and graffitied surface, similar to the front but with less color variety.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows faded graffiti and rust, with no handles or wheels visible.
attribute_lid_type: curved flat lid, single section, likely metal or plastic, no visible hinges or locking mechanisms
